title: Freshified Music Discs (RP)
description: Revamps the look of all discs in Minecraft by giving them a old time feel.
body:
# **Freshified Music Discs**

Freshified Music Discs is a small texture pack with the goal of bringing the vanilla music discs and jukebox back into the past by giving them that old timey feel. Its a simple pack that makes collecting music discs even more interesting!

![All revamped disc textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4653b8964a94abc69db4427e331aafdf1fc04999.png)

### How to install

- Download the .zip file for Freshified Music Discs
- Go to %appdata%
- Copy .zip to /Roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks
  - (You can delete the old version that you have installed)
- Load Minecraft and select the Freshified Music Disc Texture Pack

OR

- Download the resource pack to your instance in the Modrinth app


<details>
<summary>Terms of Use</summary>
You are allowed to alter Freshified Music Discs as long as it's not distributed, please keep these to yourself. Do not reupload any instance of the Freshified Music Discs texture pack. If you want to create addons for Freshified Music Discs, make sure that no unnecessary textures exist in the addon texture pack, only then are you allowed to upload it.
</details>

If you find any bugs, missing textures or have any other issues, let me know in the google form.
